title: [Deep Freeze, Cave of Ice]
description: You are dazzled by an explosion of dancing lights reflected by the occasional sunbeams venturing through the crack into this chamber of ice.  A multitude of gleaming stalactites and stalagmites makes passage through the area a grand feat.

You are dazzled by an explosion of dancing lights reflected by the occasional moonbeams venturing through the crack into this chamber of ice.  A multitude of gleaming stalactites and stalagmites makes passage through the area a grand feat.

wayto.3475: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'south'
